moments.title: England in World Cup Bronze Final
moments.blurb: England faces France tonight in the 2026 FIFA World Cup third-place playoff after their semi-final heartbreak against Argentina.

angles.name: Pre-match buzz
angles.copy: It all comes down to this: England vs France for third place in the World Cup. Can the Three Lions bounce back tonight after that semi-final defeat?

angles.name: Tuchel's dilemma
angles.copy: Manager Thomas Tuchel is expected to shake up the squad for tonight's bronze final. Who do you want to see start against France?

moments.title: The Open Championship Round 3
moments.blurb: The world's best golfers are battling it out in Round 3 of The 154th Open Championship today at Royal Birkdale.

angles.name: Live from Birkdale
angles.copy: It's Moving Day at Royal Birkdale! Who's making a charge up the leaderboard in Round 3 of The Open Championship?

angles.name: British hopes
angles.copy: Are you watching The Open? Any British golfers you're rooting for to lift the Claret Jug tomorrow?

moments.title: Splendour Festival's Final Year
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival kicks off its final ever edition today and tomorrow at Wollaton Hall, with headliners The Wombats and Snow Patrol.

angles.name: Emotional farewell
angles.copy: It's the last dance for Splendour Festival! Who's heading to Wollaton Hall this weekend to say goodbye to Nottingham's biggest festival?

angles.name: Weekend vibes
angles.copy: The Wombats and Snow Patrol headlining the final Splendour! What's been your favourite Splendour memory over the years?

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold the #1 spot for a 17th week with 'Rein Me In', while World Cup anthems 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' surge.

angles.name: Chart reign continues
angles.copy: 17 weeks at #1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still dominating the Official Singles Chart with 'Rein Me In'. Can anyone stop them?

angles.name: World Cup anthems
angles.copy: Football's (almost) coming home for the charts! Oasis's 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' are roaring back into the Top 10. What's your go-to World Cup singalong?

angles.name: New chart entries
angles.copy: Olivia Rodrigo, Sienna Spiro, Prospa & Cloonee making waves on the Official Singles Chart this week. What new tracks are on your playlist?

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: World-class athletes are competing today at the London Stadium in the London Athletics Meet, a key event in the athletics season.

angles.name: Track and field action
angles.copy: It's all happening at the London Stadium today for the London Athletics Meet! Who are you hoping to see break records?

angles.name: Inspiring athletes
angles.copy: The best of British and international athletics on display today. What's your favourite track or field event to watch?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th anniversary with music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Latitude countdown
angles.copy: Just 5 days until Latitude Festival kicks off its 20th anniversary! Who are you excited to see at Henham Park next week?

angles.name: Suffolk's big week
angles.copy: Music, comedy, arts and more! Latitude is back in Suffolk from Thursday. What's on your must-see list?

moments.title: Glasgow Commonwealth Games Build-Up
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games kick off in Glasgow on July 23rd, bringing elite sport and inclusive competition to Scotland.

angles.name: Glasgow countdown
angles.copy: Just a few days until the Commonwealth Games begin in Glasgow! Ready for some incredible sporting action?

angles.name: Scottish pride
angles.copy: Glasgow is gearing up to host the Commonwealth Games from Thursday! Which events are you most looking forward to?

moments.title: AIG Women's Open Preview
moments.blurb: The AIG Women's Open, one of women's golf's most prestigious tournaments, returns to Royal Lytham and St Annes from July 29th to August 2nd.

angles.name: Women's golf major
angles.copy: Get ready for world-class golf! The AIG Women's Open kicks off at Royal Lytham and St Annes next week. Who's your pick for the title?

angles.name: Lancashire links
angles.copy: The challenging links of Royal Lytham and St Annes await! The AIG Women's Open is just around the corner. Are you a golf fan?

moments.title: UK Heatwave Record Summer
moments.blurb: The UK has already experienced a record-breaking summer with three official heatwaves and more days above 30°C than in the whole of 1976.

angles.name: Record-breaking heat
angles.copy: It's officially a record-breaking summer! The UK has seen more days above 30°C than 1976. How have you been coping with the heat?

angles.name: Summer so far
angles.copy: Three heatwaves and record temperatures already this summer. What's been your highlight (or lowlight!) of the season so far?

moments.title: Martha Reeves is 85 Today
moments.blurb: Legendary Motown singer Martha Reeves, lead vocalist of Martha Reeves & The Vandellas, celebrates her 85th birthday today.

angles.name: Motown legend
angles.copy: Happy 85th birthday to the incredible Martha Reeves! What's your favourite Martha Reeves & The Vandellas track to get you dancing?

angles.name: Dancing in the street
angles.copy: From 'Dancing in the Street' to 'Heat Wave', Martha Reeves gave us so many iconic hits. Celebrating her 85th today!

moments.title: Richard Branson is 76 Today
moments.blurb: Entrepreneur and founder of Virgin Records, Sir Richard Branson, celebrates his 76th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Sir Richard
angles.copy: Happy 76th birthday to the visionary Sir Richard Branson! From music to space, what's his most impressive venture?

angles.name: Virgin Records legacy
angles.copy: Celebrating Richard Branson's birthday! Which iconic artists do you remember from the early days of Virgin Records?

moments.title: Gruff Rhys is 55 Today
moments.blurb: Welsh musician Gruff Rhys, frontman of Super Furry Animals and a successful solo artist, turns 55 today.

angles.name: Penblwydd Hapus Gruff!
angles.copy: Penblwydd Hapus to the brilliant Gruff Rhys, 55 today! What's your favourite Super Furry Animals or solo track?

angles.name: Welsh music icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the unique talent of Gruff Rhys on his 55th birthday. A true icon of Welsh music!

moments.title: Slash Turns 61 Next Week
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses legendary guitarist Slash (Saul Hudson) will celebrate his 61st birthday on July 23rd.

angles.name: Slash countdown
angles.copy: The top hat and guitar solos are coming! Slash turns 61 next week. What's your all-time favourite Guns N' Roses riff?

angles.name: Guitar legend
angles.copy: Next Thursday, we're celebrating the birthday of guitar god Slash! What makes his playing so iconic?

moments.title: Jacoby Shaddix Turns 50
moments.blurb: Papa Roach frontman Jacoby Shaddix will celebrate his 50th birthday on July 28th.

angles.name: Papa Roach at 50
angles.copy: Cut my life into pieces, this is my birthday week! Jacoby Shaddix of Papa Roach turns 50 next Tuesday. What's your go-to Papa Roach anthem?

angles.name: Nu-metal icon
angles.copy: Celebrating a nu-metal icon next week! Jacoby Shaddix hits the big 5-0. What's your favourite Papa Roach song?

moments.title: New BBC Comedy 'Ann Droid'
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in the quirky new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid', which premiered this July.

angles.name: New BBC fun
angles.copy: Diane Morgan is back! Have you caught the new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid' yet? What do you think of her new robot companion?

angles.name: Quirky British TV
angles.copy: If you love a quirky British comedy, 'Ann Droid' on the BBC is a must-watch this month. Perfect for a Friday night in!

moments.title: Ricky Gervais's 'Alley Cats' on Netflix
moments.blurb: Ricky Gervais's new adult animated series 'Alley Cats', featuring foul-mouthed feral cats, is set to premiere on Netflix on August 7th.

angles.name: Gervais's return
angles.copy: Ricky Gervais is back with 'Alley Cats' on Netflix soon! An adult animated series about foul-mouthed feral cats – sounds about right, doesn't it?

angles.name: New Netflix comedy
angles.copy: Mark your calendars for August 7th! Ricky Gervais's new animated comedy 'Alley Cats' drops on Netflix. Are you ready for some feline fun?
